task_completion.description: The document font is set to 'Courier New' or 'Liberation Mono' at 12 points.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text in the document appears as a monospace font. The font family dropdown in the toolbar shows 'Courier New' or 'Liberation Mono', and the font size dropdown shows '12'.

task_completion.description: Page margins are set to 1.50 inches for the left margin and 1.00 inch for top, bottom, and right margins.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Page Style/Settings dialog shows Left: 1.50", Right: 1.00", Top: 1.00", Bottom: 1.00". Alternatively, the horizontal ruler at the top of the document visually reflects a wider left margin compared to the right.
When the cursor is on a scene heading (e.g., 'INT. OLD MAN'S BEDROOM - NIGHT'), the style dropdown menu in the toolbar displays 'Heading 1'.
Character names (e.g., 'NARRATOR', 'OFFICER DUPIN') appear horizontally centered on the page, and the 'Align Center' button in the toolbar is highlighted when the cursor is on them.
Transitions (e.g., 'FADE IN:', 'CUT TO:') appear at the right edge of the page, and the 'Align Right' button in the toolbar is highlighted when the cursor is on them.

task_completion.description: The formatted document is saved as 'screenplay_formatted.docx'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title bar of the word processor displays 'screenplay_formatted.docx', or a 'Save As' dialog is visible showing this exact filename in the /home/ga/Documents/ directory.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical word processor (like LibreOffice Writer) to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a word processor GUI open and being interacted with, rather than terminal windows running python scripts or command-line text manipulation tools.

integrity.description: The agent used actual alignment settings rather than manually typing spaces or tabs to position text.
integrity.visual_evidence: The alignment buttons (Center, Right) in the toolbar are used/highlighted for the respective elements, rather than seeing large gaps of whitespace characters or manual indentation.

integrity.description: The agent saved the modifications to the new required file path rather than just overwriting the draft.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Save As' dialog is used to create 'screenplay_formatted.docx', leaving the original 'screenplay_draft.docx' intact.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The document contains 3 scene headings (INT. OLD MAN'S BEDROOM - NIGHT, INT. HOUSE - HALLWAY - NIGHT, INT. OLD MAN'S BEDROOM - DAY) which must be styled as 'Heading 1'. It contains 3 transitions (FADE IN:, CUT TO:, FADE OUT.) which must be right-aligned. It contains 4 character names (NARRATOR (V.O.), NARRATOR, OFFICER DUPIN, OFFICER 2) which must be center-aligned. The font must be Courier New or Liberation Mono at 12pt. Margins must be exactly 1.5 inches left, and 1.0 inch right/top/bottom.
